name: Loom
philosophy: Loom's web presence is async-video-for-work chrome — a deep purple primary (#625df5) as the brand voltage, soft rounded cards, illustration-driven heroes featuring people in the act of recording a video. The atmosphere is friendly workplace SaaS: approachable, animated, and confident that async video is the future of work communication.

design_language.motion_signature: Friendly micro-animations — hover lift on cards (1.02 + 200ms ease), playful idle animations on hero illustrations, soft spring on button press (50ms scale down + 100ms back). Video player previews auto-play silently on hover.

trademark_signals: Loom Purple (#625df5) — the brand voltage on CTAs, the wordmark, and selected illustration accents
Soft rounded cards (12–16px radius) — friendly SaaS
Illustration-driven heroes — people in the act of recording or watching async video
Video-message thumbnail mockup — circular recorder avatar overlaid on a video frame
Inter typography across chrome — modern humanist sans
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace Loom Purple with a saturated tech-blue — the specific lavender-purple is brand
Don't sharpen card radii below 8px — friendly SaaS softness
Don't sanitize the recording-people illustrations to generic 3D renders
Don't strip the video-message thumbnail style — circular recorder avatar overlay is brand signature
